scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "electron . --dev"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-packager . "Aragon Write" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=app-release --overwrite --no-asar --extra-resource=backend/dist/server.cjs "--ignore=(node_modules|\.git|dist-installer|app-release|backend/src|backend/node_modules|frontend/node_modules)" --prune=true
